pre_capture_js: (async function() { function delay(ms) { return new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, ms); }); } function click(el) { el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true})); } function walkText(root) { var walker = document.createTreeWalker(root, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); var text = ''; var node; while (node = walker.nextNode()) { var p = node.parentElement; if (p && (p.tagName === 'STYLE' || p.tagName === 'SCRIPT')) continue; var t = node.textContent.trim(); if (t.length > 1) text += t + ' '; } return text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); } var fpn = null, sr = null, floors = null; for (var i = 0; i < 30; i++) { fpn = document.querySelector('floorplan-navigator.fpn-one'); if (fpn && fpn.shadowRoot) { sr = fpn.shadowRoot; floors = sr.querySelectorAll('li.unit-filters__floor'); if (floors.length) break; } await delay(500); } if (!fpn || !sr || !floors || !floors.length) { var errDiv = document.createElement('div'); errDiv.id = 'fpn-extracted'; errDiv.textContent = '[FPN-73-BROADWAY ERROR: not rendered after 15s]'; document.body.appendChild(errDiv); return; } var pieces = ['[FPN-73-BROADWAY floors=' + floors.length + ']']; for (var j = 0; j < floors.length; j++) { click(floors[j]); await delay(450); pieces.push(walkText(sr)); } var div = document.createElement('div'); div.id = 'fpn-extracted'; div.textContent = pieces.join('\n---FLOOR---\n'); document.body.appendChild(div); })();
extraction_hint: This page lists units for 73 Broadway only (Story of Midtown). The pre_capture_js dumps each floor's units between '---FLOOR---' separators. Each unit appears as 'Unit XXXX' followed by bedroom count (e.g. '3 Bedrooms', '2 Bathroom'), interior sqft (e.g. '935 SqFt'), price (e.g. '$4,280'), and availability. The same unit may appear in multiple floor sections — extract each unique 'Unit XXXX' once. Ignore any 75 Broadway content (should not be present). Building name: 'Story of Midtown'.
